title: DIMCP EP_14 Hypnotist
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_14 Hypnotist.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Ruff, ruff, ruff!
[00:00:01.14] S-S-N-S-H-C-T-L.
[00:00:07.62] So, no shit, let's come to the light here.
[00:00:09.42] Uh, I can see my arms and my eyes.
[00:00:14.06] Can you see the reflection of my arms holding the phone in my eyes?
[00:00:22.30] Ruff!
[00:00:24.30] There's a lot of fucking reflection in these sunglasses just staring at them.
[00:00:31.30] I'm a hypnotist.
[00:00:43.30] Tracey!
[00:00:50.30] We love Tracey here on the show, Dogg is my co-pilot.
[00:00:52.80] We're about to go through the Taco Bell drive-through to fucking order some shit for some fool.
[00:00:56.80] Ruff!
